response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics for 'Togetsukyou ~Kimi Omou~' provided in the JSON reference. 2. Used burnt-in on-screen text for 'Stop' (00:34) and 'Stock' (01:53) to ensure spelling accuracy as per the hierarchy. 3. Subtitled the full duration of the video segment, including the complete song performance and the subsequent speaking segment. 4. Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal activations to ensure perfect synchronization and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 寄り添う二人に 君がオーバーラップ
subtitles.english: As you overlap with the two people close together,

subtitles.original: 色なき風に 思い馳せて
subtitles.english: Sending my thoughts on the colorless wind,

subtitles.original: 触れた手の温もり今も
subtitles.english: the warmth of our touching hands, even now...

subtitles.original: Stop 時間を止めて
subtitles.english: Stop, and make time stand still.

subtitles.original: そういつの日だって
subtitles.english: Yes, no matter what day it is,

subtitles.original: 君の言葉忘れないの
subtitles.english: I won't forget your words.

subtitles.original: 会いたい時に会えない
subtitles.english: When I want to see you, I can't.

subtitles.original: 会いたい時に会えない
subtitles.english: When I want to see you, I can't.

subtitles.original: 切なくて もどかしい
subtitles.english: It's painful and so frustrating.

subtitles.english: Togetsu Bridge stained in deep crimson,

subtitles.original: 導かれる日願って
subtitles.english: praying for the day I am led to you.

subtitles.original: 川の流れに祈りを込めて
subtitles.english: Putting my prayers into the river's flow,

subtitles.original: I've been thinking about you

subtitles.english: The ancient scenery remains unchanged,

subtitles.original: 今この瞳に映し出す

subtitles.original: 彩りゆく季節越えて
subtitles.english: Beyond the seasons as they color,

subtitles.english: Stock, do you remember?

subtitles.original: 会いたい時に会えない
subtitles.english: When I want to see you, I can't.

subtitles.english: When I want to see you, I can't.

subtitles.original: この胸を焦がすの

subtitles.original: 君となら 不安さえ

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、ここまでどうでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: Alright! So, how was it up to this point?

subtitles.original: いやーもう、数多くのゲストに出ていただいて、もう余は本当に嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: Wow, so many guests appeared, and I'm truly happy.

subtitles.original: 本当に、今回のライブは最初にも言ったんですけど、
subtitles.english: Truly, as I said at the beginning of this live,

subtitles.original: ちょっと和風な感じでまとめさせていただいたので、
subtitles.english: I put it together with a Japanese-style feel.

subtitles.original: 曲も、もうほぼほぼ全部和風っぽい感じで、
subtitles.english: With almost all the songs being Japanese-style,

subtitles.original: 雰囲気をひとつに統一してライブを作らせていただきました。
subtitles.english: I created this live with a unified atmosphere.

subtitles.original: そしてみんな気づいたかな？ちょっと歌ってる最中ちょっと気づきましたこれ？
subtitles.english: And did everyone notice? Did you notice this while I was singing?

subtitles.original: おっ！気づきました？新しいマイクなんですよ！すごいでしょ！
subtitles.english: Oh! You noticed? It's a new microphone! Isn't it great?

subtitles.original: すごいっしょ。え、見て見て。このちょっと、わかりますか？このおなかの柄と...
subtitles.english: It's amazing, right? Hey, look, look. Can you see this pattern on the stomach...
